name: Chocolate or Cocoa Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the baking powder, salt, and cocoa with flour.
2. Separate the whites from the yolks of the eggs.
3. Beat the egg yolks, then add some milk and blend well.
4. Gradually add sugar to the mixture, stirring until dissolved.
5. Add the remaining milk to the mixture and continue blending.
6. Incorporate the dry ingredients all at once.
7. Stir in the melted fat.
8. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites last.
9. Cook on a waffle iron.
10. Serve as a dessert with whipped cream.
